raw_consumer_statement: My credit card company keeps denying my claim for a dispute on my card. I placed an order but never received the item. I sent an email to the shipping company and they confirmed they didnt deliver the item and they returned it to XXXX XXXX. Best Buy wont issue me a refund because the shipping company marked it as delivered despite saying they didnt deliver it. Now I submitted the email as proof the item didnt get delivered and they keep denying the dispute
